label: In-context & test-time learning

node.label: In-context & test-time learning
node.definition: Behavior adapts from context, demonstrations, feedback, or computation at inference time without conventional retraining.
node.why_it_matters: In this atlas graph, In-context & test-time learning is modeled as depending on Self-supervised learning, Sequences, events & time series and feeding downstream nodes such as Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines, Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning.
examples: atlas downstream link to Continual learning & test-time adaptation pipelines
atlas downstream link to Chain-of-thought & latent reasoning
limitations: The chosen learning signal and interaction pattern may not match the deployment objective or data-generating process. Its direct dependencies include Self-supervised learning, Sequences, events & time series.

dependencies.rationale: In this atlas graph, In-context & test-time learning has a `trained_under` dependency on Self-supervised learning with `common` strength.

In this atlas graph, In-context & test-time learning has a `uses` dependency on Sequences, events & time series because Sequences, events & time series is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.

In this atlas graph, In-context & test-time learning has a `uses` dependency on Embeddings & distributed representations because Embeddings & distributed representations is modeled as a reusable ingredient for the node.
In this atlas graph, In-context & test-time learning has a `trained_under` dependency on Meta-learning with `common` strength.
